_comment: Which hooks under hooks/ are wired live into ~/.claude/settings.json, and to which event surface. check-judge-listed.py (SPEC INV-211, gate v) reds when a wired judge is absent from its surface's hook array — the no-verdict failure of a judge whose file is present but whose settings.json entry is gone. A library hook is one the pack does not wire into its default settings.json — either a hook invoked by another hook (register_judge_core), or an OPT-IN hook a host turns on by adding it to their own settings.json (the conduct-judge arms, the lean-orchestrator-scan net); gate v never demands a library hook be live, so an opt-in net keeps the suite green until a host enables it. Every file under hooks/ must appear in exactly one of the two lists, or the gate reds asking that it be classified — the self-widening honesty config-health (gate m) already uses.
